CustomField.description: Stripe webhook endpoint signing secret (whsec_...). Used by ULBC_StripeWebhook to verify the Stripe-Signature header on every incoming payload. Test mode and live mode use different secrets — swap this value when flipping to production (OQ-029). Set via Setup → Custom Settings → ULBC Stripe Settings → Manage. Hierarchy custom setting reads bypass FLS, so this field does not appear on any permission set; only Setup access (Customize Application) gates write access.
CustomField.label: Webhook Signing Secret
